source: in-session Claude Code agent (pred-scout-coach) over data/omeda/items.json only; every number ground-checked against the item, failing lines dropped

items.marksman-crest: Free starting pick for ranged carries who want lifesteal, attack speed, and power, healing to evolve into Sharpshooter Crest as they farm.
items.orb-of-enlightenment: Mage core for casters wanting heavy magical power plus health and mana, slowly restoring 3% missing health to stay topped off in lane.
items.wardens-faith: Frontline tank pick against crit-heavy enemies, giving heavy armor and health while taking 20% less critical damage and cutting their physical power 8%.
items.terminus: Sustain carry buy for long fights, stacking crit, power, and lifesteal, then turning overheal into a shield that decays out of combat.
items.warrior-crest: Free starting pick for bruisers wanting power, health, and steady healing, evolving into Champion Crest as you fight through the lane.
items.occult-crest: Free starting pick for mages wanting health, magical power, and cooldown reduction, healing toward an evolution into Warlock Crest.
items.keeper-crest: Support starter for players helping allies; spend charges near teammates to earn gold and evolve, sacrificing minion gold instead.
items.time-flux-band: Free utility pick for mages who want mana, cooldown help, and an escape that teleports back and resets your basic ability cooldowns.
items.crystal-tear: Enchanter buy granting power, mana, and cooldown help, briefly giving you and an ally extra magical power and ability haste.
items.enras-blessing: Support pick to protect dive-prone teammates, shielding nearby allies the moment they get stunned or locked down, with bulk for yourself.
items.gaussian-greaves: Mage boots for mobile casters wanting power, health, and armor, gaining a double jump that lands a damaging, slowing shockwave.
items.lunaria: Healer item for supports; banked damage charges convert into a heal that finds your lowest-health ally, rewarding aggressive casting.
items.mutilator: Bruiser buy against tanky enemies, draining their health by a percentage and healing you back while you spam abilities.
items.lifebinder: Mage sustain pick stacking magical power and lifesteal as you fight, for casters who want to heal off their spells in long trades.
items.storm-breaker: Attack-speed carry item that builds momentum, then unleashes a lightning bolt chaining to several enemies while applying your on-hit effects.
items.dread: Bruiser pick against magic damage, giving power, armor, and penetration plus a shield blocking a quarter of incoming magic.
items.crystalline-cuirass: Tank item versus magic dealers, stacking magical armor in fights and granting movement speed once fully stacked to chase or escape.
items.tempest: Free pick for fighters in the middle of brawls, hitting up to three nearby enemies each second and healing off the damage.
items.lifecore: Healer mage item; banking damage charges fires a healing wisp at your weakest ally, for supports who want to deal and mend.
items.rift-walkers: Support starter for engaging; dash in and pull enemies together, gain extra wards, while taking reduced minion gold.
items.solaris: Crit carry item adding power, mana, and cooldown help, empowering an attack that heals you for most of its damage.
items.onixian-quiver: Attack-speed crit carry buy firing extra projectiles and boosting your crit chance, with more damage reduction the lower your health drops.
items.dreambinder: Mage item for casters wanting power and health while slowing enemies, helping you kite and stick to targets in fights.
items.prophecy: Hybrid attacker item blending attack speed, magical power, and cooldown help, adding bonus magic damage to every basic attack.
items.viper: Attack-speed fighter pick against armored foes, shredding their physical armor as you hit and boosting your on-hit and ability damage.
items.nex: Free pick for fighters storing damage taken, then releasing a heavy slowing blast on nearby enemies for a strong burst.
items.flux-matrix: Tank utility item making one enemy take 10% more magic damage and cutting their crowd-control resistance, for setting up your mages.
items.absolution: Brawler item with tenacity, power, and armor, plus a button granting damage reduction and big movement speed to dive or escape.
items.tainted-blade: Fighter pick against healers, cutting target healing 45% and making them take 5% more damage, with power and health for trading.
items.everbloom: Support item granting allies brief damage reduction and crowd-control resistance, for enchanters protecting teammates in skirmishes.
items.combustion: Mage core for wave-clear and poke, adding mana, power, and penetration plus a frequent burst hitting the target and nearby enemies.
items.florescence: Support starter for vision and mobility; place a bouncy mushroom to reposition allies, gain extra wards, taking reduced minion gold.
items.silentium: Support starter to shut down a key caster, silencing a hero for 0.75 seconds and dealing damage, with extra wards.
items.draconum: Bruiser pick for sustain in long fights, stacking increased healing as you brawl and restoring health, plus armor and cooldown help.
items.obelisk: Free snowball pick for mages collecting souls on kills, growing each empowered attack's damage and permanent magical power as you win fights.
items.magnify: Mage item against magic-armor stackers, shredding their magical armor as you cast, with power, health, and lifesteal for extended fights.
items.spear-of-desolation: Assassin item adding power, penetration, and cooldown help, boosting your damage briefly and lowering your ultimate's cooldown for repeated bursts.
items.raiment-of-renewal: Heavy tank item with huge health and tenacity, steadily regenerating missing health for frontliners who outlast enemies in drawn-out fights.
items.tranquility: Support starter for teamfights, healing yourself and nearby allies and granting brief damage reduction, with extra wards.
items.citadel: Bruiser item against armored enemies, giving armor, power, and health while cutting their physical armor 20% to help your team's hits land.
items.galaxy-greaves: Mage boots for casters wanting armor, mana, and cooldown help, with movement speed and a higher jump after stacking up.
items.earthshaker: Bruiser item rewarding repeated casts, stacking increased ability damage in fights, faster for melee heroes, with attack speed, health, and power.
items.frosted-lure: Tank pick for engaging, dealing damage and slowing nearby enemies while shielding you, with armor and health to dive in.
items.gaia-greaves: Tank boots building movement speed stacks, then spending them for bonus attack damage, with armor, health, and a higher jump.
items.giants-ring: Tank item lowering your cooldowns as you fight, plus a button to grow, reduce damage, and double that cooldown help in brawls.
items.reclamation: Support starter against crowd control, cleansing yourself and nearby allies of debuffs, with extra wards, taking reduced minion gold.
items.overlord: Bruiser item that permanently grows your health by stacking takedowns, dealing splash damage around your target, for snowballing frontliners.
items.overseer: Mage item for sustained damage, increasing your damage and healing you for a quarter of what you deal to heroes.
items.consort-crest: Support starter; spend charges near allies for gold to evolve into Keeper Crest, taking reduced minion gold while you babysit.
items.abyssal-dart: Free assassin pick to catch targets; fire a marking dart, then teleport in dealing damage and a heavy slow to lock them down.
items.razorback: Free tank pick for fights, briefly boosting both armors and reflecting 15% of damage enemies deal to you back at them.
items.magician-crest: Free starting pick for mana-hungry casters, giving power, mana, and cooldown help, restoring mana to evolve into Wizard Crest.
items.omen: Fighter item building momentum into an empowered attack that, on landing, cuts your non-ultimate cooldowns by 25% for rapid follow-up.
items.astral-catalyst: Burst mage item lowering your ultimate cooldown and dealing bonus damage inside enemy shields, with mana, power, and cooldown help.
items.berserkers-axe: Bruiser item with power, health, and movement speed, empowering an attack that slows the target while you gain a speed burst.
items.nyr-warboots: Free tank boots for escaping or chasing, granting a movement speed burst and steady health regeneration over five seconds.
items.amulet-of-chaos: Burst mage item with heavy penetration and power, slashing your basic ability cooldowns 65% and restoring missing mana for a second combo.
items.inquisition: Tanky mage item with armor, health, and mana, emitting frequent energy waves that hit nearby enemies and hurt monsters extra.
items.brutallax: Free pick against crowd control, cleansing debuffs and granting full resistance, extended by landing basic attacks, with power and lifesteal.
items.nuclear-rounds: Hybrid carry item stacking attack speed, crit, and cooldown help while boosting your ability damage, for attackers who also cast.
items.claw-of-hermes: Mage item against mana-reliant enemies, draining their mana as true damage, with power, health, and mana plus scaling ability damage.
items.rapture: Attack-speed bruiser item with lifesteal and health, adding bonus on-hit damage to every basic attack against the target.
items.spirit-of-amir: Jungle mage item granting lifesteal in the jungle or power outside it, with penetration and bonus damage to monsters for fast clears.
items.truesilver-bracelet: Support item with health, mana, and power, granting a shield that makes you immune to crowd control and explodes when it breaks.
items.mistmeadow-buckler: Bruiser item building charges that block flat damage from each hit, with power, regeneration, and magical armor for sustained brawls.
items.eviscerator: Free attack pick for fights, briefly boosting attack speed, lifesteal, and on-hit damage when you need a burst of sustained damage.
items.oathkeeper: Mage item with mana, power, and cooldown help, empowering an attack to deal extra on-hit damage for caster-attackers.
items.mindrazor: Bruiser item dealing splash damage around your target and boosting your power, with mana and cooldown help for ability-based fighters.
items.exodus: Free pick to disrupt groups; lob a grenade that stuns and knocks enemies back, making them take more damage from you.
items.iceskorn-talons: Frontline pick for teamfights, creating an ice sheet that buffs allies' power and speed while slowing enemies standing on it.
items.crescelia: Mage item with power, cooldown help, and mana regen, empowering an attack that deals bonus damage and lowers your non-ultimate cooldowns.
items.tainted-totem: Support mage item against healers, cutting target healing 45% and letting allies apply it too, with health, power, and mana regen.
items.tainted-charm: Tanky support item against healers, permanently cutting nearby enemy healing and slowing them, with big health, tenacity, and mana regen.
items.devotion: Enchanter item making heals and shields stronger on low allies and reducing big incoming hits, for supports protecting frontliners.
items.spellbreaker: Mage item against burst casters, granting a shield that blocks the next enemy ability, plus 15% more magical power.
items.rebirth: Tank insurance item; on death, return as a drone and resurrect if you survive, with armor and cooldown help for frontliners.
items.hexbound-bracers: Mana-tank item restoring mana from damage taken and reducing enemy basic attack damage, with big health and mana for durable casters.
items.marshal: Support mage item granting attack speed and bonus on-hit damage, with power, mana regen, and cooldown help for poke-heavy enchanters.
items.plasma-blade: Hybrid carry item with crit, both powers, and attack speed, stacking crit chance as you fight for attackers who also cast.
items.pacifier: Free pick to finish low targets; dash and empower an attack dealing big bonus damage to enemies below 20% health, recastable on kills.
items.basilisk: Fighter item against armored enemies, shredding their physical armor as you hit and granting a movement burst, with health, power, and cooldown help.
items.cursed-scroll: Tank brawler item with huge regeneration and armor, trading small self-damage to hurt enemies, for frontliners who out-sustain fights.
items.salvation: Bruiser item with tenacity, power, and health, granting a shield and omnivamp to survive and heal through a teamfight.
items.volcanica: Bruiser item that lowers your basic ability cooldowns when you fight, especially after ultimates, with health, power, and cooldown help.
items.demolisher: Crit carry item against armor stackers, ignoring 25% of physical armor and even more bonus armor on crits, with power and crit.
items.tainted-scepter: Mage item against healers, cutting target healing 45% while stacking Malice to add growing bonus ability damage, with health and power.
items.noxia: Burst mage item with heavy power and cooldown help, marking a hero to detonate for bonus damage based on their max health.
items.syonic-echo: Carry item resetting your attack and giving your next three attacks bonus attack speed, with lifesteal, power, and cooldown help.
items.titan-crest: Free tank starter with health and both armors, slowly healing to evolve into Goliath Crest as your frontline takes shape.
items.spectral-schematics: Mage item against high-health enemies, adding flat plus current-health-based bonus damage, with health, power, and cooldown help.
items.megacosm: Mage item against tanky enemies, burning a percentage of their max and bonus health over time, with health, power, and cooldown help.
items.typhoon: Free attack-speed pick stacking speed as you hit, with health, power, and a short dash to reposition in fights.
items.imperator: Crit carry item with heavy power and crit, making your critical strikes deal 30% more damage for hard-hitting attackers.
items.luxforge-lantern: Snowball fighter item permanently gaining power from takedowns and ward kills, with health and movement speed to keep roaming.
items.fire-blossom: Tank item with big health and armor, burning nearby enemies for ramping damage over time, for frontliners who stick in fights.
items.ortus: Free snowball pick granting movement speed and power, with takedowns permanently adding power and refreshing the buff for roaming fighters.
items.assassin-crest: Free assassin starter with penetration, power, and cooldown help, healing to evolve into a Legendary Crest as you snowball.
items.entropy: Mage item adding bonus damage on every ability tick, with power, mana, and cooldown help for casters with multi-hit spells.
items.tainted-rounds: Crit carry item against healers, cutting healing and dealing more on-hit damage as targets drop, with power, attack speed, and crit.
items.dynamo: Tank item making one enemy take 10% more damage, granting power that scales to your build, for frontliners enabling teammates.
items.vyzar-carapace: Fighter item applying stacks that trigger a damaging burst and shield you, with health, power, and cooldown help for sustained brawls.
items.voidgazer: Free mage pick to catch targets; fire a piercing slow projectile that makes hit enemies take 15% more damage briefly.
items.void-helm: Tank item with big health and magical armor, healing 20% more from all sources, for frontliners who lean on sustain.
items.azure-core: Mage item with mana, power, and cooldown help, granting a shield and stacking mana into bonus magical power for scaling casters.
items.gravitum: Free pick to lock down jumpers; fire a long-range piercing projectile that grounds the first hero hit, with power and health.
items.dust-devil: Crit carry item stacking attack speed in fights, granting movement speed at full stacks, with crit and power for chasing attackers.
items.tainted-bastion: Tank item against healers, cutting healing and reducing damage taken, doubled versus targets you've debuffed, with health, regen, and armor.
items.solstice: Fighter item banking stacks, then spending them for a damaging hit that heals you, with both armors and power for skirmishers.
items.champion-crest: Free bruiser starter with power, health, and lifesteal, steadily healing to evolve into a Legendary Crest as you fight.
items.aegis-of-agawar: Tank carry item with health, power, and crit, boosting both armors more when low, for durable attackers in long fights.
items.xenia: Support item granting allies a repeatable shield, with armor, health, and cooldown help, for enchanters protecting teammates in skirmishes.
items.soulbearer: Free support pick granting a shield plus magical lifesteal and movement speed, with power and mana for enchanters diving in.
items.cursed-ring: Attack-speed carry item raising your attack cap and speed at the cost of weaker hits, with both powers, for relentless attackers.
items.ashbringer: Crit carry item lowering your non-ultimate cooldowns on hit, faster on crits, with attack speed, power, crit, and cooldown help.
items.warp-stream: Tank utility item with big health and mana, upgrading your Blink to a lower-cooldown teleport, plus ultimate cooldown reduction.
items.tainted-trident: Fighter item against healers, cutting healing and adding bonus damage, with penetration, power, and cooldown help for armored matchups.
items.unbroken-will: Tank item with big health and tenacity, briefly boosting both armors when you take damage, for frontliners weathering bursts.
items.leafsong: Support starter for engages and escapes, speeding nearby allies and freeing them from slows, with extra wards, taking reduced minion gold.
items.wizard-crest: Free caster starter with mana, power, and cooldown help, restoring mana to evolve into a Legendary Crest as you scale.
items.necrosis: Crit carry item lowering your ultimate's cooldown and boosting its damage, with attack speed, power, and crit for ultimate-reliant attackers.
items.spectra: Attack-speed carry item applying stacks that trigger bonus damage scaling with the target's missing health, for finishing wounded enemies.
items.timewarp: Mage item with heavy cooldown help, mana regen, and power, shaving a second off your non-ultimate cooldowns for constant casting.
items.echelon-cloak: Fighter item granting camouflage to reposition, then bonus damage and sustain after, with attack speed, health, power, and cooldown help.
items.elafrost: Bruiser item with big health, armor, and cooldown help, empowering an attack that slows and splashes, hitting monsters extra hard.
items.manta-scythe: Carry item for fast farming and split-pushing, dealing extra to minions and isolated enemies, permanently gaining power off siege kills.
items.infernum: Fighter item against tanky enemies, stacking a burn that ignites for percent-max-health damage, with penetration, power, mana, and cooldown help.
items.malady: Assassin item against high-health targets, exploding them for max-health damage and stacking a resetting nuke on takedowns, with power and penetration.
items.ruination: Crit carry item against mana users, draining mana as true damage, with heavy power and crit for punishing casters in extended fights.
items.void-conduit: Tank sustain item with health, magical armor, and movement speed, granting omnivamp and mana regen for durable, self-sustaining frontliners.
items.stonewall: Tank item against physical damage, with heavy armor, health, and regeneration, mitigating a share of all physical damage you take.
items.liberator: Free pick against crowd control, cleansing all debuffs and granting a shield, with power, attack speed, and lifesteal for fighters.
items.demon-edge: Bruiser item with penetration, power, health, and cooldown help, granting a movement burst and bonus damage inside enemy shields.
items.rogue-crest: Free assassin starter with power, penetration, and cooldown help, healing to evolve into Assassin Crest as you snowball early.
items.caustica: Mage item against magic-armor stackers, ignoring 35% of it and dealing more damage the more bonus magical armor they carry.
items.orb-of-growth: Mage starter gaining experience from kills to evolve into Orb Of Enlightenment, with power, mana, health, and missing-health healing.
items.mesmer: Assassin item against burst casters, granting a shield that blocks the next enemy ability, with power, penetration, and health.
items.sanctification: Support starter for teamfights, shielding nearby heroes and granting them crowd-control resistance, with extra wards, taking reduced minion gold.
items.cybernetic-drive: Tank item with health, magical armor, and regen, executing low enemies with an empowered attack and boosting both your armors.
items.warden-crest: Support starter; spend charges near allies for health and gold to evolve, with health and regen, taking reduced minion gold.
items.lightning-hawk: Crit carry item building momentum into an empowered attack that deals bonus damage and slows, with attack speed, crit, and power.
items.resolution: Attack-speed fighter item adding bonus on-hit damage and stacking mana into bonus power, with penetration for hitting armored enemies.
items.vanquisher: Crit carry finisher item with power, penetration, and crit, outright executing enemies, for closing out wounded targets in fights.
items.equinox: Crit carry item with power, attack speed, crit, and tenacity, granting a big shield to survive bursts and brawl through fights.
items.saphirs-mantle: Free tank pick growing your size and health, damaging nearby enemies, then permanently adding health based on damage dealt.
items.alternator: Fighter item boosting your alternate ability's damage and stacking casts to evolve into Alternata, with penetration, mana, power, and cooldown help.
items.windcaller: Support item granting you and an ally repeatable movement speed, with heal boost, mana regen, and power for enchanters keeping teammates mobile.
items.judgement: Free pick for melee fights, dealing area damage and healing off heroes hit, with health, power, and omnivamp for sustain.
items.vanguardian: Tank item with both armors, tenacity, and cooldown help, adding flat armor on top, for well-rounded frontline durability.
items.guardian-crest: Support starter; spend charges near allies for health and gold to evolve into Keeper Crest, with health and regen, reduced minion gold.
items.transference: Tank support item converting spent shields into health, with both armors, health, and movement speed, for shield-reliant frontliners.
items.scattershot: Crit carry item firing homing projectiles off your attacks that hit nearby enemies, applying on-hit effects, with power, crit, and attack speed.
items.earth-spirit: Free tank engage pick; transform into an unstoppable rolling boulder that damages enemies and stuns the hero you crash into.
items.tainted-guard: Tank item against healers, cutting source healing and applying a bleed, with heavy armor, health, and cooldown help for frontliners.
items.golems-gift: Mage-tank item stacking magical power and armor, losing stacks when hit but restoring them by casting, with mana and cooldown help.
items.goliath-crest: Free tank starter with health and both armors, slowly healing to evolve into a Legendary Crest as your frontline scales.
items.soulbinder: Long-range mage item dealing bonus damage from afar and permanently gaining power as you fight, with mana and heavy cooldown help.
items.tyranny: Fighter item granting movement speed and ability haste on use, re-triggering on takedowns, with health, power, and ultimate haste.
items.winters-fury: Free mage pick zoning fights; an expanding icy zone damages, slows, and makes enemies take more magic damage, with power and health.
items.frostguard: Tank item against attack-speed carries, stacking attack speed reduction on attackers, with health and both armors for the frontline.
items.vainglory: Tank item stacking increasing armors the longer you fight, plus a flat armor boost, with health and both armors for durability.
items.world-breaker: Tanky mage item stacking increased magical damage as you fight, with health, tenacity, and bonus power, for durable casters in long fights.
items.wraith-leggings: Mage boots with heavy power, penetration, and movement speed, adding 12% bonus magical damage to abilities for chasing burst casters.
items.orion: Mage item converting your item ability haste into attack speed and ramping damage on a target, with mana, power, and cooldown help.
items.epoch: Free utility pick; enter stasis for 2.5 seconds to dodge incoming burst or wait out danger, with power, mana, and cooldown help.
items.dawnstar: Bruiser item stacking enemy damage reduction on hit, faster for melee, granting an attack speed burst, with armor, health, and regen.
items.sky-splitter: Attack-speed carry item dealing percent-current-health damage on hit, for shredding tanky enemies, with lifesteal and power.
items.oblivion-crown: Pure burst mage item with the highest magical power plus a 25% power boost, for casters who only want maximum damage.
items.catalytic-drive: Tank item executing low enemies with an empowered attack and granting bonus gold, evolving into Cybernetic Drive, with health, armor, and regen.
items.painweaver: Bruiser item stacking penetration and movement speed as you fight, with power and movement speed, for chasing armored enemies.
items.the-perforator: Fighter item against armored enemies, ignoring 30% of physical armor and slowing on abilities, with penetration, power, and cooldown help.
items.nightfall: Bruiser item healing off ability damage and granting a shield, with power, omnivamp, and penetration for sustaining through fights.
items.augmentation: Carry item empowering an attack with bonus base-power damage, with power, attack speed, health, and cooldown help for steady attackers.
items.warlock-crest: Free mage starter with health, power, and cooldown help, healing to evolve into a Legendary Crest as you scale.
items.envy: Assassin item guaranteeing a critical strike on your next attack and silencing a target, with penetration, mana, and power for bursting.
items.witchstalker: Free pick against crowd control, cleansing debuffs and empowering an attack for percent-max-health damage that heals you, doubled after cleansing.
items.deathstalker: Attack-speed carry item shredding physical armor on hit and granting bonus attack speed, for melting armored enemies in extended fights.
items.alternata: Fighter item boosting your alternate ability's damage and lowering your other cooldowns, with mana, power, penetration, and cooldown help.
items.penumbra: Assassin item cutting your non-ultimate cooldowns for fast combos, with health, penetration, power, and heavy cooldown help.
items.pygmy-dust: Support starter to disable a threat; shrink an enemy to slow and weaken them, or buff an ally, with extra wards.
items.legacy: Bruiser item with health, magical armor, tenacity, and power, granting a self-cleanse and crowd-control immunity to survive lockdown.
items.fist-of-razuul: Tank item with huge health and cooldown help, empowering an attack for bonus damage that heals you, doubled on heroes and monsters.
items.sharpshooter-crest: Free evolved carry crest with lifesteal, power, and attack speed, healing toward a final evolution into a Legendary Crest.
